Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Bareius]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Bareius is an alchemist.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Bareius is an alchemist who may send a proxy to the meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Bareius is funding the alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Bareius is a bespectacled alchemist standing to the right of Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 11''' — Bareius issued orders to Rina.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bareius knows Bliss is the Head of the Blackwatch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Bareius avoids harming Bliss because she is difficult to replace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Bareius is present and has been shuffling through papers.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Bareius is hesitant about a deal for peace between the Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Bareius is unlikely to disarm regardless of what he says.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Bareius is described as the richest man in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Bareius is part of the group led by Estyr.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — Bareius stands to Estyr's right.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bareius was under the effect of an augmentation potion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Bareius waved at Shera to stop her from dropping.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Bareius sat at the head of the table and showed nervous energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Bareius is someone Yala has been talking to about sponsoring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Bareius owns printing-houses.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Nathanael Bareius is a Guild Head and an equal to Shera in power and influence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Bareius brought a couple of servants who were alchemists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bareius walked to the edge of the deck of The Final Solution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bareius has protections against assassination that have reached paranoid levels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Bareius is a person Shera suspected of conspiring with Calder Marten and Jyrine.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
